cfps.title: data2day
cfps.description:
Oktober 2026 findet die data2day zum dreizehnten Mal statt. Die Konferenz für Data Scientists, Data Engineers und Data Teams 
liefert maßgeschneidertes praxisnahes Wissen rund um Data Science vom Einsteigerprojekt bis zur Data-driven Company. Sie vermittelt sowohl Grundlagen für den Einstieg in Data Science und Machine Learning für Data Beginners wie auch tiefer greifende 
Informationen zu Architekturen, Prozessen und Vorgehensmodellen für Data Professionals.

cfps.title: TechSummit Amsterdam
cfps.description: Join us in shaping a future where IT and AI systems are not only robust but also scalable and forward-thinking. Be part of our community and bring in your knowledge and skills to share with the technical audience. Our audience will be (very) technical, so we are not interested in commercially focused talks, but are rather looking for talks that interest a technical audience as well as speakers that are not afraid to share technical details :).

cfps.description: It will take place on  November 11 and 12, 2026 —including a workshop day beforehand—once again at the Rosengarten Mannheim. cfps.title: Fork it!
cfps.description:
If you’ve got something cool to share, now’s the time! 
 What’s Fork it! about? It’s simple: we talk about  real stuff. No bullshit, no sales pitches —just honest discussions about  experiences, feedback, and the latest in tech. Whether it’s lessons learned from past projects, what worked (or didn’t), or insights into emerging trends, we want to hear from you.

cfps.title: The ACS/IEEE 23rd International Conference on Computer Systems and Applications
cfps.description:
We cordially invite academics, researchers, industry pioneers, and practitioners to contribute their latest discoveries and participate in vibrant scholarly discourse spanning distributed computing, data science, security, and machine intelligence. Sharjah 2026  
      Nestled at the crossroads of tradition and innovation, the University of Sharjah will host AICCSA 2026 — where the Arabian Gulf's golden shores meet a visionary skyline, creating an inspiring backdrop for intellectual exchange. The Program Committee extends a formal invitation for original contributions — encompassing technical and experimental studies, theoretical frameworks, conceptual innovations, and comprehensive surveys — to be submitted via the EasyChair system.

cfps.title: Heapcon
cfps.description: Heapcon 2026 Call For Papers Heapcon 2026 Call For Papers Great news - Heapcon 2026 is here! We are very excited to receive your application for this year's Heapcon. In case you haven't heard of us, Heapcon is a tech conference for software engineers and technology enthusiasts, taking place at Madlenianum in Belgrade, Serbia on the 5th and 6th of November, 2026. Free conference pass for a guest Showcase your expertise to a diverse and engaged audience.

cfps.title: Confitura
cfps.description: We’re focusing on meaningful content for today’s evolving IT landscape, a strong community, and speakers worth your time, all in a well-balanced, easy-to-enjoy format at an affordable price. confitura'25  in numbers  Everything started in 2007, when a group of passionate Java developers created a programming event for their local community. Today, Confitura brings together people from across Poland and beyond, with content in both Polish and English.

cfps.title: Great International AI Native Summit (GAINS)
cfps.description:
📍 Bengaluru, India  📅 09–10 December 2026  ⏳ Submission Deadline: 15th July 2026 
             🏛️ The GAINS Editorial Mandate 
             GAINS is not a generic AI conference. The Great International AI Native Summit (GAINS) is an engineering-first summit focused on the design, behavior, operation, supervision, and operational maturation of AI-native systems. What Do We Mean By AI-Native? 
             AI-native systems are systems whose behavior is shaped by intelligence rather than being entirely determined by predefined software logic.
categories: the focus areas below are not technology categories
